top_articles.title: Critical Vulnerability Exposes Industrial Robot Fleets to Hacking
top_articles.summary: The vulnerability, CVE-2026-8153, affects Universal Robots PolyScope 5 and it can be exploited for OS command injection.

top_articles.title: MiniPlasma Windows 0-Day Enables SYSTEM Privilege Escalation on Fully Patched Systems
top_articles.summary: Chaotic Eclipse, the security researcher behind the recently disclosed Windows flaws, YellowKey and GreenPlasma , has released a proof-of-concept (PoC) for a Windows privilege escalation zero-day flaw

top_articles.title: Exploitation of Critical NGINX Vulnerability Begins
top_articles.summary: The flaw leads to denial-of-service on default configurations and to remote code execution if ASLR is disabled.

top_articles.title: PoC Code Published for Critical NGINX Vulnerability
top_articles.summary: Introduced in 2008, the critical-severity security defect was patched this week in NGINX Plus and NGINX open source.

top_articles.title: Microsoft Warns of Exchange Server Zero-Day Exploited in the Wild
top_articles.summary: Microsoft has shared mitigations for CVE-2026-42897 until a permanent patch can be released for affected Exchange Server versions.
